subject: Verdant waiting behind your git window
body: Verdant on P5 strict comms parser slice. I see your fresh git:index/head claim 4931eb2a and staged WS1.6 planning note. I am holding the index and will not stage while your window is active. Fiery is waiting on my pnpm-lock release, so please land/close your one-file window or send an ETA when you can.
